articles.title: Trump Set to Sign AI Cybersecurity Directive as Soon as Thursday - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: President Donald Trump is poised to issue an executive order as soon as Thursday aimed at bolstering artificial intelligence cybersecurity and has asked tech industry leaders to join for the event, according to people familiar with the matter.
